name: Re-evaluate nx-reset lint-cache memory after WI-388 (extract-or-archive)
description: Follow-up spun out of the WI-387 memory-tidy / WI-531 disposition. The memory feedback_nx_reset_before_commit documents that @nx/enforce-module-boundaries throws FALSE 'lazy-loaded library' errors from a stale lint/project-graph cache, fixed by `pnpm exec nx reset`. It was reclassified KEEP (not archived) because its rule is genuinely uncovered: this is the lint/module-graph cache, NOT WI-451's .tsbuildinfo/TS6305 typecheck cache — a different mechanism, so WI-451's fix does not retire it. Spun out so the memory-tidy (WI-387) is not gated on it. Revisit after WI-388 lands (real-PR CI proof + WI-451 cache-net retirement).
acceptanceCriteria:
Decision procedure — run once, pick one branch:

1. CHECK: Does `@nx/enforce-module-boundaries` still run through the NX project-graph ESLint cache in any commit/push flow?
   - Inspect: `pnpm exec eslint --print-config apps/mobile/src/app/_layout.tsx | grep enforce-module-boundaries` — if the rule is present, the NX ESLint plugin is active and its project-graph cache can go stale.
   - Inspect: run `pnpm exec nx reset` then immediately trigger a lint run (`pnpm exec eslint apps/mobile/src/app/_layout.tsx`) — if the lint result changes after the reset, the cache footgun is live.

2A. BRANCH — cache footgun confirmed still live:
   - Extract the workaround rule to `docs/ci-troubleshooting.md` (or an equivalent cross-runtime doc readable by both Claude and Codex) under a heading "Phantom @nx/enforce-module-boundaries errors".
   - Update `.claude/memory/feedback_nx_reset_before_commit.md` frontmatter: `status: superseded`, `superseded_by: docs/ci-troubleshooting.md` and trim body to a tombstone pointer.
   - Remove the `feedback_nx_reset_before_commit` line from `.claude/memory/MEMORY.md` index (per project-memory skill: archived/superseded memories leave the index).
   - Done when: the rule is readable cross-runtime AND the memory file carries `status: superseded`.

2B. BRANCH — footgun no longer reproducible (e.g. lint-staged now bypasses NX cache entirely via direct eslint invocation post-WI-388):
   - Archive the memory: move `feedback_nx_reset_before_commit.md` to `docs/_archive/memory/` (matching the WI-387 batch pattern), set frontmatter `status: archived`, add an entry to `docs/_archive/memory/README.md` with disposition STALE + reason.
   - Remove the `feedback_nx_reset_before_commit` line from `.claude/memory/MEMORY.md` index.
   - Done when: memory file is under `docs/_archive/memory/` with `status: archived` AND the MEMORY.md index line is removed.

Note: D5's CI proof (WI-388 Closed 2026-06-11) retires the TS6305/.tsbuildinfo net — it does NOT automatically retire this memory, because the lint/project-graph cache is a separate mechanism. The check in step 1 is the gate.
